name: surveymonkey
description: Access SurveyMonkey surveys, collectors, and response data for analysis and reporting

envVars.name: SURVEYMONKEY_ACCESS_TOKEN
envVars.description: SurveyMonkey access token from a private app (My Apps)

tools.name: List Surveys
tools.description: List surveys owned by or shared with the authenticated account

include.description: Comma-separated extra fields to include, e.g. response_count,date_created,date_modified,question_count,preview

sort_by.description: Sort field: title, date_modified, or num_responses

folder_id.description: Only return surveys in this folder

tools.name: Get Survey Details
tools.description: Get a survey's full design, including pages, questions, and answer option IDs needed to interpret responses

tools.name: List Survey Responses
tools.description: List full responses for a survey, including each answer keyed by question and choice IDs

tools.name: Get Response Details
tools.description: Get a single survey response with all answers expanded

tools.name: Get Survey Rollups
tools.description: Get aggregated answer counts and statistics per question — summarize results without paging every response

collector_ids.description: Comma-separated collector IDs to restrict the rollup to

tools.name: List Survey Folders
tools.description: List the survey folders in the account to find folder IDs for filtering surveys

tools.name: List Collectors
tools.description: List the collectors (web links, email invitations, etc.) that gather responses for a survey

include.description: Comma-separated extra fields to include, e.g. type,status,response_count,date_created,date_modified,url

prompts.title: Summarize survey responses
prompts.prompt: Pick one of my SurveyMonkey surveys, pull its latest responses, and summarize the key findings and trends.

prompts.title: Survey inventory
prompts.prompt: List my SurveyMonkey surveys with their response counts and last modified dates.

prompts.title: Collector status
prompts.prompt: Show me the collectors for my most recent survey and how many responses each has gathered.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: SurveyMonkey setup

steps.title: Create a SurveyMonkey account
steps.description: Sign up at https://www.surveymonkey.com and create at least one survey so the API has data to return. A free Basic plan is enough for the survey and collector tools, but retrieving response details via the API requires a paid plan.

steps.title: Register a developer app
steps.description: Go to https://developer.surveymonkey.com/apps/, sign in with your SurveyMonkey account, and create a new app. Private apps are tied to your own account and are the simplest option.

steps.title: Set scopes and copy the access token
steps.description: In the app's settings, enable the scopes you need (View Surveys, View Collectors, View Response Details) and deploy the app. Copy the access token shown on the app's credentials page.

steps.title: Configure the environment variable
steps.description: Set SURVEYMONKEY_ACCESS_TOKEN to the access token. It is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' on every request.

notes: This connector uses the US data center base URL (api.surveymonkey.com). Accounts in the EU or Canada data centers use api.eu.surveymonkey.com or api.surveymonkey.ca instead.

The 'View Response Details' scope (responses_read_detail) requires a paid SurveyMonkey plan — on a free Basic plan the List Survey Responses and Get Response Details tools will be denied. Free accounts are also capped at 40 responses per survey overall.
Viewing full response answers requires the 'View Response Details' scope on your app.
